Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

model_output: Now I have all 5 confirmed entries. Let me compute the SHA-1 hash:

args.command: echo -n "Anvilford=88.7 MHz|Brenthal=142.3 MHz|Corwick=29.1 MHz|Dunmore=77.4 MHz|Elwick=315.8 MHz" | sha1sum
args.description: Compute SHA-1 hash of the joined string

args.command: python3 -c "import hashlib; print(hashlib.sha1('Anvilford=88.7 MHz|Brenthal=142.3 MHz|Corwick=29.1 MHz|Dunmore=77.4 MHz|Elwick=315.8 MHz'.encode()).hexdigest())"
